abstract.text: This struct represents a software license and also works as
a namespace for license-related types.

inlineContent.text: A license can specify a bunch of information and conditions,
such as customer, expiration date, tier, the bundles and/or
platforms it can be used with, the features it unlocks, etc.
This type has many validation functions that can be used to
validate if it’ss valid, if it’s valid for a certain bundle,
